---
title: "\'Three Generations: The Book Box\'  By The Editor"
---

## \'Three Generations: The Book Box\'  By The Editor

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1896
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Short Story in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 6.21 (Jan, 1896) 14-21

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
